rows.topQuote: GME Observers Definition of GME Observer A GME Observer is an LCME-accredited Medical School graduate or international equivalent who wishes to gain medical knowledge and exposure to certain patient-care protocols through observing a residency or fellowship program for typically less than one month in duration.
